_description: Example MCP server configuration. Copy into your Claude Code settings (not into the plugin) — plugin MCP config is separate. These are server hints; install them via `claude mcp add` or your settings.

context7._purpose: Live documentation lookup for third-party libs (replaces guessing)

playwright._purpose: Browser automation for frontend verification and a11y testing

github._purpose: PRs, issues, code search against GitHub without leaving the session

postgres._purpose: Schema introspection and query review against a local Postgres (not prod!)
